stemHtml: Prior to starting a reciprocating engine at sea level the manifold pressure gauge usually indicates approximately 29 inch Hg. This is because the:

options.a: pointer on the gauge is stuck at the full-power indication.
options.b: throttle is in the full-open position.
options.c: throttle is closed, trapping high pressure in the manifold.
options.d: pressure in the manifold is the same as atmospheric pressure.
